steps.title: Identify the contrasting goal
steps.content: The goal is to contrast the number of meteorite falls with the number of meteorite finds — not just define what each type is, but show the numerical difference.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D — While there have been only about 1,200 recorded meteorite falls, there have been over 60,000 meteorite finds. alone includes both specific numbers (1,200 and 60,000) with language (“while” and “only”) that emphasizes the dramatic difference.
The other three choices either define the categories without any numbers (A and B) or present only one number while omitting the other (C).
That matches Choice D — While there have been only about 1,200 recorded meteorite falls, there have been over 60,000 meteorite finds..
